Free stock trading. 
Stop paying up to $10 for every trade.
We cut out the fat that makes other brokerages costly - storefront locations and manual account management.
Member of SIPC. Securities in your account protected up to $500,000. For details, please see www.sipc.org.

Stay on top of your portfolio. 
Anytime. Anywhere.
Fast execution, real-time market data, and smart notifications help you make the most of the stock market no matter where you are.
